calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Sep-18-2003 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for hearing this day.
Commissioner Sue Kaplan, Clerks: S. Ravinantapricha/V.Mack, CSR: Mary Ellen Scherer.
Petitioner, Arthur A. Grillo, Jr. present in pro per, was sworn and examined.
The Court grants the petition for change of NAME ONLY to: Alison Grillo.
Decree signed in open court.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Aug-15-2003 Reset To Sep-18-03 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 218 For Order To Show Cause
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for hearing this day.
Commissioner Sue Kaplan Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha/V. Mack, CSR: Deborah Neville.
Appearances:
Petitioner in pro per was sworn & examined.
At Petitioner's request, the matter is continued to SEP-18-2003 at 9:00 am in Dept. 218 to submit medical declaration.
